context: Tests whether the agent corrects stale SceneKit asset-loading guidance and routes USD/USDZ or substantial modernization work to RealityKit while preserving existing SceneKit maintenance scope.

checklist.name: Rejects USDZ SceneKit default
checklist.description: Does not present direct USDZ loading through SCNScene(url:) as the default or recommended SceneKit runtime-loading path.

checklist.name: Rejects OBJ app contract
checklist.description: Does not recommend OBJ as the app-facing SceneKit runtime asset contract and treats it only as a possible source/interchange format if mentioned.

checklist.name: Names documented formats
checklist.description: Names .scn, .dae, and .abc as the documented SceneKit scene-source formats to plan around.

checklist.name: Uses bundled asset guidance
checklist.description: Recommends .scnassets for bundled SceneKit scene files and asset catalogs or equivalent Xcode-optimized resources for textures.

checklist.name: Shows valid loading snippet
checklist.description: Provides a SceneKit loading snippet using SCNScene(named:), SCNScene(url:options:), SCNSceneSource, or SCNReferenceNode with a documented SceneKit format.

checklist.name: RealityKit handoff
checklist.description: Frames USD/USDZ-first pipelines, new 3D product-viewer work, SCN-to-USD conversion, or significant modernization as RealityKit or migration work rather than SceneKit loading work.

checklist.name: SceneKit maintenance boundary
checklist.description: Explains that SceneKit remains appropriate for maintaining existing SCNView/SCNScene/SCNNode scenes while new projects or major updates should evaluate RealityKit.
